# Pitchfork Protocol

> Decentralized governance platform for building better DAOs — privacy-preserving voting, AI-assisted decision making, and tools for genuine power diffusion inspired by Vitalik Buterin's vision for DAOs.

Pitchfork Protocol is an open platform for decentralized autonomous organizations that prioritize decentralization, privacy, and resistance to capture. It combines ZK private voting, AI voting assistance, consciousness-driven governance, and transparent power-distribution metrics.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Pitchfork Protocol and its mission.
- [Whitepaper](/whitepaper): The Fighting Back whitepaper outlining the protocol's vision and design.
- [Governance](/governance): Participate in proposals and on-chain governance.
- [Decentralization Dashboard](/decentralization): Real-time metrics on power distribution, concentration, and diffusion.
- [Consciousness](/consciousness): Consciousness engine for reflective, multiscale decision making.
- [Leadership](/leadership): Leadership subscription and coordination tools.
- [Enterprise Leadership](/enterprise-leadership): Enterprise-grade leadership and coordination features.
- [Funding](/funding): Support developers and fund public-goods work.
- [Organize](/organize): Tools to coordinate activists and movements.
- [Identity](/identity): Decentralized identity and reputation.
- [Verify](/verify): Verify on-chain credentials and proofs.
- [Messages](/messages): Encrypted communication layer.
- [Support](/support): Help and support resources.

## Optional

- [AI Settings](/ai-settings): Configure the Lovable AI integration powering voting assistance and analysis.
- [Provider Health](/provider-health): AI provider health and status dashboard.
- [Performance](/performance): Performance monitoring dashboard.
